top_signals.title: Three months in, is Trump losing the Iran war?
top_signals.summary: With Iran's grip on the Strait of Hormuz, its resistance to nuclear concessions and its government largely intact, doubts are growing that Trump can pull out a geopolitical win.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: The new arms race in computing power
top_signals.summary: Military capability depends increasingly on data centres. Now governments outpaced in AI are looking to experimental technologies
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Arsenal’s hold on the streets and the elites
top_signals.summary: How the team achieved such cultural reach in an unsuccessful era
